tools.name: person_enrich_from_email
tools.description:
Enrich a person's profile with additional data from their email address, name, domain, or LinkedIn URL. Alternative to Apollo people-enrich at 5x lower cost. Returns structured JSON with full contact and professional details.

1. fullName (string) -- first and last name
2. jobTitle (string) -- curre

tools.description:
Enrich a person's profile with additional data from their email address, name, domain, or LinkedIn URL. Alternative to Apollo people-enrich at 5x lower cost. Returns structured JSON with full contact and professional details.

1. fullName (string) -- first and last name

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email · Private data: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email · Public sink: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email · Destructive: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email · Private data: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email · Public sink: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email · Destructive: person_enrich_from_email, person_enrich_from_email

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "person_enrich_from_email" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "Enrich a person's profile with additional data from their email address, name, domain, or LinkedIn URL. Alternative to Apollo people-enrich at 5x lower cost. Returns structured JSON with full contact and professional details.

1. fullName (string) -- first and last name
2. jobTitle (string) -- curre" → after: "Enrich a person's profile with additional data from their email address, name, domain, or LinkedIn URL. Alternative to Apollo people-enrich at 5x lower cost. Returns structured JSON with full contact and professional details.

1. fullName (string) -- first and last name
2. jobTitle (string) -- curre"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
